properties.displayName: Time-Based Evasion via Sleep Ping-Delay or Timeout
properties.description: Detect long execution delays often used to evade sandboxes, including Start-Sleep, timeout, and ping loops as timers.
properties.query:
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where (Image|endswith has "\powershell.exe" or Image|endswith has "\pwsh.exe") and (CommandLine|contains has "Start-Sleep" or CommandLine|contains has "Start-Sleep -s" or CommandLine|contains has "Start-Sleep -Seconds") and Image endswith "\cmd.exe" and (CommandLine|contains has "timeout /t " or CommandLine|contains has "choice /t ") and (CommandLine|contains has "ping -n " or CommandLine|contains has "ping -w ") and (CommandLine|contains has "300" or CommandLine|contains has "600" or CommandLine|contains has "900" or CommandLine|contains has "1200")
